The Pentagon confirmed we spent $11.3 billion in the first 6 days of the Iran war.  That same money could have: 1. Funded the VA mental health system for over 5 years 2. Kept the TSA fully funded for more than 6 years, no shutdowns, no agents working for free 3. Fed every food-insecure child in America for a full year 4. Built 113,000 units of affordable housing 5. This is from a real deposition in the lawsuit challenging DOGE’s dismantling of the National Endowment for the Humanities. Here’s what the discovery revealed: DOGE fed grant descriptions into ChatGPT and asked it to decide which ones were “DEI.” Whatever the chatbot said? Gone. That list replaced the one prepared by actual NEH staff. Grants that got cut: Native American language preservation. An Appalachian photo archive.
